channel.title: Tenable Network Security, Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Tenable Network Security, Inc. (tenable).

item.title: CVE-2026-9646 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — ScadaBR Unauthenticated Reflected Cross-Site Scripting
item.description: A reflected cross-site scripting issue exists in URL handling.

item.title: CVE-2026-9645 · 9.9 CRITICAL — ScadaBR Authenticated Remote Code Execution
item.description: Exposed methods allow authenticated users to create and execute arbitrary JavaScript code on the server. The scripts execute with full access, enabling complete system compromise as commands are executed as root.

item.title: CVE-2026-8359 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Gladinet Triofox WOSHttpStatusModule.dll NULL Function Pointer Call DoS
item.description: When processing a request with a URL path starting with /status or /sysinfo, WOSHttpStatusModule.dll is to be loaded to handle such URL patterns. The WOSBin_LoadHttpModule function in the dll would be called to set up a "module" object for that modul…

item.title: CVE-2026-8360 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Gladinet Triofox Unchecked Return Value to NULL Pointer Dereference DOS
item.description: Function calls to WOSCommonUtil.dll!WOSSysInfoGetDeviceInterface() in various DLLs (i.e., WOSProfileMgrModule.dll, WOSWebDavModule.dll) can return a NULL pointer (i.e., when no user is logged into the Triofox Server Agent Management Console). The ret…

item.title: CVE-2026-8361 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Gladinet Triofox Path Traversal in WOSDefaultHttpModule.dll
item.description: A path traversal vulnerability exists in WOSDefaultHttpModule.dll when processing a URL path starting with /woshome

item.title: CVE-2026-8362 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Gladinet Triofox Stack-based Buffer Overflow in WOSDefaultHttpModule.dll
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow condition exists in WOSDefaultHttpModule.dll when processing a long URL path starting with /woshome

item.title: CVE-2026-8363 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Gladinet Triofox Stack-based Buffer Overflow in WOSDeviceDropFolder.dll
item.description: A stack-based buffer overflow condition exists in WOSDeviceDropFolder.dll when processing a long URL path starting with /resources:

item.title: CVE-2026-8364 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Gladinet Triofox Missing Authentication for Critical Functions
item.description: Gladinet Triofox Cloud Server Agent Access Service (GladServerAgentService.exe) listens on TCP port 7878 and processes remote HTTP messages with URL paths starting with /resources, /status, /sysinfo, /woshome, /Settings, /schedule, or /DavCache.

item.title: CVE-2026-9065 · 9.3 CRITICAL — Surecart - SQL Injection
item.description: SureCart version prior to 4.2.1 are vulnerable to authenticated SQL injection via multiple parameters ('model_name', 'model_id', 'integration_id', 'provider') on the REST API endpoint '/surecart/v1/integrations/{id}'. The root cause is a flawed escap…

item.title: CVE-2026-9059 · 9.3 CRITICAL — NextGEN Gallery - SQL Injection
item.description: NextGEN Gallery version prior to 4.2.1 are vulnerable to authenticated SQL injection via the 'orderby' parameter on the REST API endpoints '/imagely/v1/galleries' and '/imagely/v1/albums'. The root cause is an insufficient sanitization function ('_cl…

item.title: CVE-2026-47358 · 9.3 CRITICAL
item.description: Terrascan v1.18.3 and prior are vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) via external URL resolution in uploaded IaC templates when running in server mode. When Terrascan parses uploaded ARM templates or CloudFormation templates, it resolves…

item.title: CVE-2026-47357 · 9.3 CRITICAL
item.description: Terrascan v1.18.3 and prior are vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) via the remote_url parameter in the remote directory scan endpoint (POST /v1/{iac}/{iacVersion}/{cloud}/remote/dir/scan) when running in server mode. An unauthenticated…

item.title: CVE-2026-47356 · 8.7 HIGH
item.description: Terrascan v1.18.3 and prior are vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) via the webhook_url parameter in the file scan endpoint (POST /v1/{iac}/{iacVersion}/{cloud}/local/file/scan) when running in server mode. An unauthenticated remote atta…

item.title: CVE-2026-8367 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — aria2c Improper Certificate Validation
item.description: aria2c accepts a server certificate with incorrect Extended Key Usage (EKU). If the attackers compromise a certificate (with the associated private key) issued for a different purpose, they may be able to reuse it for TLS server authentication.

item.title: CVE-2026-1858 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — wget2 Improper Certificate Validation
item.description: wget2 accepts a server certificate with incorrect Key Usage (KU) or Extended Key Usage (EKU). If the attackers compromise a certificate (with the associated private key) issued for a different purpose, they may be able to reuse it for TLS server auth…

item.title: CVE-2026-33694 · 7.4 HIGH — Junction File Manipulation
item.description: This vulnerability allows an attacker to create a junction, enabling the deletion of arbitrary files with SYSTEM privileges. As a result, this condition potentially facilitates arbitrary code execution, whereby an attacker may exploit the vulnerabili…

item.title: CVE-2026-5027 · 8.8 HIGH — Langflow - Path Traversal Arbitrary File Write via upload_user_file
item.description: The 'POST /api/v2/files' endpoint does not sanitize the 'filename' parameter from the multipart form data, allowing an attacker to write files to arbitrary locations on the filesystem using path traversal sequences ('../').

item.title: CVE-2026-5026 · 7 HIGH — Langflow - Stored XSS via Malicious SVG Upload
item.description: The '/api/v1/files/images/{flow_id}/{file_name}' endpoint serves SVG files with the 'image/svg+xml' content type without sanitizing their content. Since SVG files can contain embedded JavaScript, an attacker can upload a malicious SVG that executes a…

item.title: CVE-2026-5025 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Langflow - Application Logs Exposed to All Authenticated Users
item.description: The '/logs' and '/logs-stream' endpoints in the log router allow any authenticated user to read the full application log buffer. These endpoints only require basic authentication ('get_current_active_user') without any privilege checks (e.g., 'is_sup…

item.title: CVE-2026-5022 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Langflow - Missing Authorization on download_image Endpoint
item.description: The '/api/v1/files/images/{flow_id}/{file_name}' endpoint does not enforce any authentication or authorization checks, allowing any unauthenticated user to download images belonging to any flow by knowing (or guessing) the flow ID and file name.

item.title: CVE-2026-4984 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Botpress - Credential Disclosure via Twilio Webhook Handler
item.description: The Twilio integration webhook handler accepts any POST request without validating Twilio's 'X-Twilio-Signature'. When processing media messages, it fetches user-controlled URLs ('MediaUrlN' parameters) using HTTP requests that include the integratio…

item.title: CVE-2026-4433 · 1.9 LOW
item.description: An SSH misconfigurations exists in Tenable OT that led to the potential exfiltration of socket, port, and service information via the ostunnel user and GatewayPorts. This could be used to potentially glean information about the underlying system and…

item.title: CVE-2026-3432 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sim Studio AI - Unauthenticated OAuth Token Theft
item.description: On SimStudio version below to 0.5.74, the `/api/auth/oauth/token` endpoint contains a code path that bypasses all authorization checks when provided with `credentialAccountUserId` and `providerId` parameters. An unauthenticated attacker can retrieve…

item.title: CVE-2026-3431 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Sim Studio AI - MongoDB SSRF and Arbitrary Document Deletion
item.description: On SimStudio version below to 0.5.74, the MongoDB tool endpoints accept arbitrary connection parameters from the caller without authentication or host restrictions. An attacker can leverage these endpoints to connect to any reachable MongoDB instance…

item.title: CVE-2026-2698 · 6.5 MEDIUM — Improper Access Control
item.description: An improper access control vulnerability exists where an authenticated user could access areas outside of their authorized scope.

item.title: CVE-2026-2697 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Indirect Object Reference (IDOR) in Security Center
item.description: An Indirect Object Reference (IDOR) in Security Center allows an authenticated remote attacker to escalate privileges via the 'owner' parameter.

item.title: CVE-2026-2630 · 8.8 HIGH — [R1] Stand-alone Security Patches Available for Tenable Security Center versions 6.5.1, 6.6.0 and 6.7.2: SC-202602.1 + SC-202602.2
item.description: A Command Injection vulnerability exists where an authenticated, remote attacker could execute arbitrary code on the underlying server where Tenable Security Center is hosted.

item.title: CVE-2026-2577 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Nanobot Unauthenticated WhatsApp Session Hijack via WebSocket Bridge
item.description: The WhatsApp bridge component in Nanobot binds the WebSocket server to all network interfaces (0.0.0.0) on port 3001 by default and does not require authentication for incoming connections. An unauthenticated remote attacker with network access to th…

item.title: CVE-2026-2026 · 6.1 MEDIUM — Improper Access Control Allows Denial of Service
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified where weak file permissions in the Nessus Agent directory on Windows hosts could allow unauthorized access, potentially permitting Denial of Service (DoS) attacks.

item.title: CVE-2025-36640 · 8.8 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: A vulnerability has been identified in the installation/uninstallation of the Nessus Agent Tray App on Windows Hosts which could lead to escalation of privileges.

item.title: CVE-2025-36730 · 4.6 MEDIUM — Windsurf Prompt Injection via Filename
item.description: A prompt injection vulnerability exists in Windsurft version 1.10.7 in Write mode using SWE-1 model. It is possible to create a file name that will be appended to the user prompt causing Windsurf to follow its instructions.

item.title: CVE-2025-36636 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Improper Access Control
item.description: In Tenable Security Center versions prior to 6.7.0, an improper access control vulnerability exists where an authenticated user could access areas outside of their authorized scope.

item.title: CVE-2025-36729 · 7.2 HIGH — RACOM M!DGE2 Privilege Escalation via SDK Testing Endpoint
item.description: A non-primary administrator user with admin rights to the web interface but without shell access permissions can display configuration of the device including the master admin password. This vulnerability also allows the user to give themselves shell…

item.title: CVE-2025-36728 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SimpleHelp Cross Site Request Forgery
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Simplehelp.This issue affects Simplehelp: before 5.5.11.

item.title: CVE-2025-36727 · 8.3 HIGH 🌩️ — SimpleHelp Inclusion of functionality from untrusted control sphere
item.description: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere vulnerability in Simplehelp.This issue affects Simplehelp: before 5.5.12.

item.title: CVE-2025-36630 · 8.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: In Tenable Nessus versions prior to 10.8.5 on a Windows host, it was found that a non-administrative user could overwrite arbitrary local system files with log content at SYSTEM privilege.

item.title: CVE-2025-36632 · 7.8 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: In Tenable Agent versions prior to 10.8.5 on a Windows host, it was found that a non-administrative user could execute code with SYSTEM privilege.

item.title: CVE-2025-36631 · 8.4 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: In Tenable Agent versions prior to 10.8.5 on a Windows host, it was found that a non-administrative user could overwrite arbitrary local system files with log content at SYSTEM privilege.

item.title: CVE-2025-36633 · 8.8 HIGH — Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: In Tenable Agent versions prior to 10.8.5 on a Windows host, it was found that a non-administrative user could arbitrarily delete local system files with SYSTEM privilege, potentially leading to local privilege escalation.

item.title: CVE-2025-35941 · 5.5 MEDIUM — mySCADA PRO Manager Password Disclosure
item.description: A password is exposed locally.

item.title: CVE-2025-35940 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Hard-coded ArchiverSpaApi JWT Signing Key
item.description: The ArchiverSpaApi ASP.NET application uses a hard-coded JWT signing key. An unauthenticated remote attacker can generate and use a verifiable JWT token to access protected ArchiverSpaApi URL endpoints.

item.title: CVE-2025-24917 · 7.8 HIGH — Improper Access Control leads to Local Privilege Escalation
item.description: In Tenable Network Monitor versions prior to 6.5.1 on a Windows host, it was found that a non-administrative user could stage files in a local directory to run arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges, potentially leading to local privilege escalation.

item.title: CVE-2025-24916 · 7 HIGH — Improper Access Control leads to Local Priviledge Escalation
item.description: When installing Tenable Network Monitor to a non-default location on a Windows host, Tenable Network Monitor versions prior to 6.5.1 did not enforce secure permissions for sub-directories. This could allow for local privilege escalation if users had…

item.title: CVE-2025-36625 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Log Poisoning in Nessus
item.description: In Nessus versions prior to 10.8.4, a non-authenticated attacker could alter Nessus logging entries by manipulating http requests to the application.

item.title: CVE-2025-24914 · 7.8 HIGH — Local Priviledge Escalation
item.description: When installing Nessus to a non-default location on a Windows host, Nessus versions prior to 10.8.4 did not enforce secure permissions for sub-directories. This could allow for local privilege escalation if users had not secured the directories in th…

item.title: CVE-2025-24915 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: When installing Nessus Agent to a non-default location on a Windows host, Nessus Agent versions prior to 10.8.3 did not enforce secure permissions for sub-directories. This could allow for local privilege escalation if users had not secured the direc…

item.title: CVE-2025-2304 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Camaleon CMS Privilege Escalation
item.description: A Privilege Escalation through a Mass Assignment exists in Camaleon CMS When a user wishes to change his password, the 'updated_ajax' method of the UsersController is called. The vulnerability stems from the use of the dangerous permit! method, which…

item.title: CVE-2025-2284 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Santesoft Sante PACS Server Access of Uninitialized Pointer DoS
item.description: A denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the "GetWebLoginCredentials" function in "Sante PACS Server.exe".

item.title: CVE-2025-2265 · 7.8 HIGH — Santesoft Sante PACS Server HTTP.db SHA1 Hash Truncation
item.description: The password of a web user in "Sante PACS Server.exe" is zero-padded to 0x2000 bytes, SHA1-hashed, base64-encoded, and stored in the USER table in the SQLite database HTTP.db. However, the number of hash bytes encoded and stored is truncated if the h…
